name: returned-goods-exception-management-cap
description: Returned Goods Exception Management CAP application.

scripts.build: cds build && cp -R app gen/srv/app && find gen/srv/app -name '*.cds' -delete && mkdir -p gen/srv/db && cp -R db/data gen/srv/db/data
scripts.build:ui: mkdir -p resources && cd app/ui && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../../../resources/returned-goods-exception-management-ui.zip .
